channel.title: boron nitride; chemical vapor deposition; high temperature; translucentcoatings; nano-crystallinity; silicon carbide; sapphire on LMI

item.title: Deposition Of Nanocrystalline Translucent H-Bn Films By Chemical Vapordeposition At High Temperature
